header.title: AI-Powered Video Research
header.subtitle: Explore any topic through curated YouTube videos and comprehensive summaries

form.queryPlaceholder: What would you like to research? (e.g., 'impact of AI on healthcare')
form.queryHint: Describe what you want to learn about (minimum {{min}} characters)

progress.awaitingQuestionApproval: Please review and approve the research questions
progress.regeneratingQuestions: Regenerating research questions based on your feedback...
progress.generatingSearchTerms: Generating search terms from approved questions...
progress.awaitingSearchTermApproval: Please review and approve the search terms
progress.regeneratingSearchTerms: Regenerating search terms based on your feedback...
progress.generatedQueriesSearching: Generated {{count}} search {{count, plural, one {query} other {queries}}}. Searching for videos...
progress.generatedQuestionsReview: Generated {{count}} research {{count, plural, one {question} other {questions}}}. Please review and approve.
progress.foundVideosFiltering: Found {{found}} {{found, plural, one {video} other {videos}}}. Filtering to select the best {{target}}...
progress.awaitingVideoApproval: Please review and approve the selected videos
progress.refilteringVideos: Reselecting videos based on your feedback...
progress.selectedVideosFetching: Selected {{count}} {{count, plural, one {video} other {videos}}}. Fetching transcripts...

messages.queryTooShort: Query must be at least {{min}} characters

success.message: Share link is ready to share

approval.approveError: Failed to approve. Please try again.
approval.regenerateError: Failed to regenerate. Please try again.

errors.approveFailed: Failed to approve. Please try again.
errors.regenerateFailed: Failed to regenerate. Please try again.
errors.invalidFeedbackLength: Feedback must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
errors.maxFeedbackExceeded: Maximum feedback attempts reached for this stage

questions.title: Review Generated Questions
questions.subtitle: These questions will guide the AI research process
questions.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe how you'd like the questions adjusted (e.g., 'Focus more on recent 2026 developments')

searchTerms.title: Review Generated Search Terms
searchTerms.subtitle: These search terms will be used to find relevant videos
searchTerms.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe how you'd like the search terms adjusted (e.g., 'Focus more on academic sources')

videos.title: Review Selected Videos
videos.subtitle: AI has selected {{count}} videos that best answer your research questions
videos.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe how you'd like the video selection adjusted (e.g., 'Include more recent videos from 2026')
